offer: For accountants managing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient document preparation causes late filings. We automate tax document generation instead of manual document preparation and filing.
problem: Inefficient generation of tax filing documents from financial statements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accountants seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
Direct message 20-50 accountants with a demo video
Participate in community forums for accountants sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual input for financial statement analysis and template generation for tax documents on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
